headline: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (IBKR) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Interactive Brokers (IBKR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
